title: Government Transparency Leak
description: A large leak exposes classified material and triggers calls for accountability.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Leo: "Prosecuting whistleblowers hides government wrongdoing. Snowden exposed illegal surveillance." (Source: The Guardian, 2013 NSA Leaks)

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Ada: "But leaks damage national credibility and markets. Stability requires controlled reform."

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Leo: "Controlled reform is often just a cover‑up."

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Ada: "And chaos is often the price of reckless disclosure."
